name: settings-workitem-states
title: Work Item States
snippet: Health Delivery Trends Planning Work Item State Classification Configure how TFS work item states map to the system's canonical lifecycle states. Each state must be classified as: • New: Work has not started yet • In Progress: Work is actively being done • Done: Work is complete and delivered • Removed: Work was cancelled or intentionally discarded Currently using default state classifications. Save your changes to create custom classifications. goal Proposed New In Progress Done Removed Active New In Progress Done Removed Completed New In Progress Done Removed Removed New In Progress Done Removed Objective Proposed New In Progress Done Removed Active New In Progress Done Removed Completed New In Progress Done Removed Removed New In Progress Done Removed Epic New New In Progress Done Removed Active New In Progress Done Removed Resolved New In Progress Done Removed Closed New In Progress Done Removed Removed New In Progress Done Removed Feature New New In Progress Done Removed Active New In Progress Done Removed Resolved New In Progress Done Removed Closed New In Progress Done Removed Removed New In Progress Done Removed Product Backlog Item New New In Progress Done Removed Approved
